name: wcag-explainer-docs
description: Static GitHub Pages docs for wcag-explainer, skinned with the Matcha Oat design system (matcha-oat-design-system tokens, synced in).

scripts.test: node scripts/sync-tokens.mjs && git diff --exit-code tokens.css fonts.css && node node_modules/matcha-oat-design-system/scripts/check-no-raw-values.mjs index.html features.html build-pipeline.html styles.css
